code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{getHealth}from'../services/healthService';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Dashboard=()=>{const[status,setStatus]=useState('loading');useEffect(()=>{getHealth().then(res=>setStatus(res.data.ok?'connected':'error')).catch(()=>setStatus('error'));},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Dashboard"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Backend status: ",status]})]});};export default Dashboard;
